response: Data collection begins with defining the study objectives to ensure data relevance and accuracy. Data sources are identified to gather data from various populations and locations. Data is analyzed to detect patterns and trends within the data set. Data entry procedures are established to maintain data integrity and consistency. Data is cross-verified with existing data to ensure reliability and validity. Data interpretation is guided by statistical methods applied to the data. Data is shared with stakeholders to support informed decision-making based on the data. Data is archived for future reference and to facilitate further data exploration.
